content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Tue, 17 Feb 2026 09:03:43 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 239 | Critical: 73 | High: 27 | Medium: 22 | Low: 117

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [MIDDLE EAST] Recalibrating U.S. Intelligence Strategy for an Uncertain Global Order (War on the Rocks)
  [GLOBAL] Interior Minister pleads : Stop sharing images of Burkina Faso attack victims (GDELT)
  [UKRAINE] Trump urges Ukraine to strike Russia deal  fast  before Geneva talks (GDELT)
  [UKRAINE] US and Iran set for high - stakes nuclear talks in Geneva as threat of war looms (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] U . S . and Iran to hold a second round of nuclear talks in Geneva (GDELT)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (54 events, 24 critical, 5 high):
    - Recalibrating U.S. Intelligence Strategy for an Uncertain Global Order
    - U . S . and Iran to hold a second round of nuclear talks in Geneva
    - Trump urges Iran to make nuclear deal saying he’ll be ‘indirectly’ involved
  Ukraine/Russia (19 events, 6 critical, 3 high):
    - Trump urges Ukraine to strike Russia deal  fast  before Geneva talks
    - US and Iran set for high - stakes nuclear talks in Geneva as threat of war looms
    - Russia-Ukraine talks live: Sides ramp up attacks before US-led negotiations
  Europe (37 events, 16 critical, 4 high):
    - Austrian man faces terror charges over Taylor Swift concert attack plot
    - 'We will discriminate': Elon Musk-backed Restore Britain party launches with hard-right vision
    - Sudan war: Sanctions and donor pledges do not fix the catastrophe on the ground
  Indo-Pacific (37 events, 2 critical, 4 high):
    - North Korea draws new red line, vows attack over future airspace ‘violations’
    - Gilded Capability: Overinvestment and the Survivability Paradox
    - Trump discusses weapons sales to Taiwan with Chinese leader
  United States (5 events, 1 critical, 2 high):
    - Inside the Strike: The US Munition That Hit a Residential Building in Venezuela
    - US boards second oil tanker in Indian Ocean after it fled Venezuelan raid
    - Pentagon to deploy roughly 200 troops to Nigeria
  Global (67 events, 12 critical, 8 high):
    - Interior Minister pleads : Stop sharing images of Burkina Faso attack victims
    - Saudi Arabia buys C-27 cargo planes fitted for armed maritime patrols
    - Bondi Beach shooting accused faces court for the first time

Sources: War on the Rocks, GDELT, Al Jazeera, NYT World, BBC World, Middle East Eye, Defense News, BBC Europe, BBC Africa, NK News, BBC Middle East, The Guardian, Breaking Defense, CISA Advisories, Bellingcat, BBC Latin America, The Diplomat, BBC Asia
